content:
Hey Keepers!

Just a quick update: The server's level/EXP system is now live on the server.

Please visit <#1436913827571695898>  for a brief write up on how it works. 

You can start earning XP and leveling up simply by being active and chatting. However, please remember to keep the conversation genuine and avoid spamming just for the sake of earning XP. We want to keep the server a quality place for everyone to hang out.

Enjoy! 🎉

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

各位守护者们好！ 

服务器等级/经验系统现已上线，敬请关注！ 

请访问 #level up 频道查看简要说明。 

您可以通过积极参与聊天来获取经验值并提升等级。但请记住，保持真诚的交流，避免为了获取经验值而刷屏。我们希望服务器成为一个高质量的休闲场所。 

祝您游戏愉快！🎉

@everyone
